description: The timezone select dropdown in document settings still opens, displays options, and allows selection after the viewport constraint change.
steps: Click the button with title 'Settings' (settings trigger button)
Wait for the heading 'Document Settings' to appear in the dialog
Click the 'Time Zone' select dropdown to open it
Take screenshot showing the timezone dropdown is open with visible options in a scrollable list
Click on a timezone option from the list to select it
Take screenshot to verify the selected timezone is now shown as the selected value
